migration.reasoning_dropped: Reasoning had no visible content, dropped
migration.apply_patch_unparsed: apply_patch could not be parsed into file changes, degraded
migration.fork_parent_fallback: Fork parent node could not be mapped precisely, fell back to end of main conversation
migration.truncated: Truncated by migration range: dropped {{dropped}} messages after turn {{max_turn}}
migration.children_not_migrated: {{count}} sub-sessions outside the truncation range were not migrated

session.unpaired_tool_use: Unpaired tool call {{tool_name}}, treated as no output
session.subagent_unlinked: Sub-agent {{child_id}} could not be linked precisely, kept as root child
session.child_foreign_ignored: Sub-session {{child_id}} does not belong to the current parent, ignored
session.child_parent_conflict: Sub-session {{child_id}} has conflicting parent pointer, ignored

codex.thread_unregistered: Thread {{session_id}} has no registration row, copy will be discovered by Codex scan
codex.thread_edge_unregistered: Thread edge {{parent}}→{{child}} not registered, endpoints missing registration rows

probe.non_json_output: Probe output could not be parsed
